attributes.action: Introduce mandatory fines for parking in  parent and child space without a child
attributes.additional_details: When people without a blue badge park in a disabled bay, they are given a ticket and a fine. However when someone parks in a parent and child bay without a child, nothing happens. As a parent its hard to get kids out the car as we do need that extra room to open the doors. There are very limited spaces as it is in public car parks so when they are being used by people not needing the space its very frustrating as its near on impossible to get a baby or toddler out of small spaces.
attributes.background: Introduce a mandatory fine or implications for people who park in a parent and child bay without children. Just like how people get tickets and fines for parking in a Diabled bay without a blue badge

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce mandatory fines for people parking in parent & child bays without kid
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747698
